title: PTD Condemns 2 Years Anniversary Crisis, Blasts NUPENG Leadership Over Controversial Elections, Divisions, Wasteful Expenditures, & Installation Of Ghost National Chairman - FinancialEDGE
description: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG has condemned in strongest term the two years internal divisions, reckless and wasteful expenditures, and a crisis of identity within its circle after admitting that the hijack of the Branch by the President and the General Secretary, Williams Akporeha and Afolabi Olawale has led to the manipulation
html: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) Branch of NUPENG has condemned in strongest term the two years internal divisions, reckless and wasteful expenditures, and a crisis of identity within its circle after admitting that the hijack of the Branch by the President and the General Secretary, Williams Akporeha and Afolabi Olawale has led to the manipulation of its extant rules and destruction of the Union’s operations and administration.
